episodes.title: Cults Can’t Save You: IBLP & the Amish | Ep.91
episodes.description:
What is life really like inside the Amish community and what happens when someone leaves?
In this episode of the Jinger & Jeremy podcast, we sit down with Mr. Vuolo to uncover the truth about Amish culture, faith, and the hidden struggles many don’t see. From strict rules and shunning to powerful stories of transformation, this conversation dives deep into one of the most misunderstood communities in the world.

We explore the realities of Amish life, including their traditions, beliefs, and the challenges individuals face when questioning the system. You’ll also hear about the dangers of isolation, the role of faith, and what true heart transformation looks like beyond rules and religion.

Whether you're curious about the Amish, interested in stories of faith and freedom, or searching for deeper truth, this episode will challenge what you think you know.

✨ Topics we cover:
- Amish culture, lifestyle, and beliefs
- The reality of shunning and isolation
- Rumspringa and youth in the Amish community
- Stories of leaving the Amish
- Faith, legalism, and true transformation
- The hidden struggles and untold stories
